references.passiveText: I'm not the first person to cause a disaster through carelessness. There's a traveler who carries a similar burden.
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} used to lead expeditions until one of their shortcuts collapsed a mine shaft and trapped a dozen workers. Everyone survived, but {target_npc} never forgave themselves. They wander now, offering guidance to anyone heading into dangerous territory, trying to prevent others from making their mistakes. Last I heard they were camped {location_hint}. If you find them, they might know safe routes through the area you're working in.

references.passiveText: The sealed chamber I opened wasn't the only one. There are others, and some of them are marked on old maps.
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} showed me a survey map from decades ago that marks at least three more sealed sites {location_hint}. They were closed for reasons nobody recorded clearly: just warnings carved into the stone. After what happened when I opened mine, I shudder to think what's behind the others. Someone should check that the seals are intact before another fool like me stumbles into one.
